_about: Manifest of APPROVED curriculum PDFs to import. Copy this file to scripts/curriculum-sources.json and fill it in. Each entry maps a Jazira catalog `key` (where the file will live on YOUR platform) to the authorized `url` to download it from ONCE. Only hosts listed in SOURCE_ALLOWLIST are fetched. Run `node scripts/import-curriculum.mjs --list-keys <prefix>` to see valid keys.
